extraction.one_line_summary: LAFAY Victor attacked solo on the final 3km climb, caught and dropped both CAMPENAERTS and CARBONI who had escaped the break, winning by 36 seconds.
tactical_patterns: CAMPENAERTS sustained 10-minute 405W chase to join break then repeatedly attacked main climb, overcooked legs for finale.
GAVIRIA targeted intermediate sprint points despite being in breakaway, suggesting sprinters jersey ambition trumped stage win tactics.
GC teams allowed break with best-placed rider 15+ minutes down to gain 7.5 minutes, accepting zero control cost.
LAFAY waited until final climb to attack despite 60km+ breakaway, showing patience paid against pre-fatigued escapees.

rider_signals.LAFAY Victor: positive: first pro win at 25 by timing single decisive attack perfectly, showing maturity beyond experience level
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: negative: burned matches with repeated attacks on main climb and 405W bridge effort, collapsed on final climb
rider_signals.CARBONI Giovanni: neutral: made correct move following CAMPENAERTS but lacked finishing power when LAFAY countered fresh
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: abandoned with knee pain after two stage wins, physical fragility undercutting sprint dominance
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: crashed after attacking main climb, prioritized points jersey over stage win strategy before crash ended chances
